description: AC5 no-regression recheck after the F7H Phase-1 full-perturbation grid%p + RK-stage grid%p refresh fixes (operational_mode.py only; the theta-carry change in acoustic.py was REVERTED because it broke the bare-core m4 path and detonated the bubble earlier).

pytest.tests/test_m4_acoustic.py: 3 passed (cgrid divergence=0 still-air, acoustic-once shapes, acoustic-scan finite)
pytest.tests/test_m4_dycore_step.py: 3 passed (pytree shape/dtype, no-nan small density current, debug-true compiles)
pytest.note: When 3+ heavy GPU test files share one pytest process they cross-contaminate (all-NaN GPU device state / cache pressure); each file passes in isolation and the 2-file combo passes identically on the committed baseline -- NOT a code regression.

f7g_ac1_signed_metric_roundtrip.note: IC still round-trips through calc_p_rho_phi to ~1e-17; unchanged by F7H.

f7g_ac2_pg_buoy_ratio.note: Pre-existing FAIL on the bare-core per-substep pg_buoy recompute metric (ratio band [0.9,1.1]); NOT introduced by F7H. The operational path no longer uses that per-substep recompute.

m6b4_column_acoustic_recurrence_parity.note: Pre-existing self-compare/savepoint parity defect (PARITY-DEFECT-LOCALIZED-AT-SUBSTEP-1); identical FAIL on HEAD~1 before any F7H change. Documented in project memory (B6 self-compare tautology).

weakened_invariants: none -- no clamps/caps/sanitizers/xfails added or weakened
